projects / windkessel effect modeling

Windkessel Effect Modeling

lumped-parameter cardiovascular model of arterial compliance

Implemented and validated a three-element Windkessel model of systemic arterial compliance, fitting model parameters to clinical waveform data. Extended to a multi-compartment network to simulate regional pressure dynamics.

role — modeling & simulation
lab — jhu course project
tools — python, matlab, simulink
